[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a person’s face partially framed by a dark, brim-like object at the top.

The main subject is a person shown from the forehead down to the nose and mouth area, with their head tilted slightly upward and facing forward. Their facial features are softly blurred, with visible eyes, eyebrows, and a neutral expression.

The setting appears to be indoors, suggested by a softly lit, indistinct background with pale and dark areas. The lighting looks even and muted, with no clear outdoor weather visible.

The person wears a dark cap or hat with a lighter yellow band across the front edge. The overall image is blurry, with a low-resolution, close cropping and a slight motion or focus blur affecting fine details. The camera angle is very close and straight-on, centered on the face.

No important visible text detected.

The image is a blurry, close-up view of a person wearing a dark cap with a yellow band. Their face fills most of the frame against an indistinct indoor background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

The screenshot contains a blurred image of a person wearing a hat. The background appears to be indoors with a light-colored wall.

# Structured Version

No text is visible in the screenshot.

# Notes

The image is blurred and does not contain any readable text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
